arts.ttl: Richards situation ‘definitely not optimal’ – QPR boss
arts.sum: Marti Cifuentes has admitted the situation with Taylor Richards is ‘definitely not optimal’ after Cambridge United made it clear they want to return the player to QPR. The League One club want to scrap the season-long loan for Richards agreed during the summer. They can only do so if Rangers agree.
